reference: Hello, dear. Unilateral short-duration pain may be due to a cluster headache if it occurs unilaterally with periodicity and is located periorbitally with attacks occurring during sleep or early morning. Other possibilities may include a short-lasting unilateral neuralgiform headache with conjunctival injection and burning.
text: Unilateral short duration pain may be due to a cluster headache if it occurs unilaterally with periodicity, in a localized territory, with attacks occurring during sleep or early morning. Other possibilities may include a short lasting unilateral neuralgic headache with jumpable injections and burning.
